hallucinations: BLVR/valve placement is entirely unsupported. The note is a routine tracheostomy tube exchange with stomal granulation treated by silver nitrate, not bronchoscopic lung-volume reduction.
CPT 31615 and 31647 are unsupported by the note.
mismatches: established_tracheostomy_route=true is used to derive bronchoscopy coding even though no bronchoscopy is documented.
missed_procedures: Tracheostomy tube exchange is the primary performed procedure and is not represented.
Stomal granulation treatment with silver nitrate is not represented.
missed_details: New tube type/size (Bivona 7.0 TTS), guide-catheter exchange technique, and absence of complication are omitted.
evaluations.cpt: 31615 and 31647 are not supported; the note describes tracheostomy tube exchange with local granulation cautery, not bronchoscopy or valve placement.
evaluations.schema: High-severity wrong procedure family with near-total loss of the real procedure.

missed_details: Right side, drained volume (1,050 mL), and specimen panel could be more granular.
evaluations.cpt: 32555 is consistent with ultrasound-guided thoracentesis.
evaluations.schema: Core pleural extraction is accurate and internally coherent.

mismatches: The note clearly documents Montgomery T-tube insertion, but no airway-stent/T-tube placement object is present.
missed_procedures: T-tube insertion is a major performed procedure and is omitted.
missed_details: T-tube size (13 × 60 × 30 mm), stoma creation at ring 2–3, and flexible confirmation are not captured as stent details.
evaluations.cpt: 31641 is supported for laser treatment, but the extraction misses the separately documented T-tube placement logic raised in the note (31631-22 / 31899 discussion).
evaluations.schema: Good capture of laser+dilation, but the defining therapeutic device placement is absent.

hallucinations: Station 3P is hallucinated from the specimen label '4L node (3p)'; only stations 4L and 7 were sampled by EBUS.
mismatches: Sedation is set to Moderate even though the note documents General anesthesia with LMA/TIVA.
31653 is upcoded from the false third station; the note supports 31652 for 2 sampled stations.
missed_details: LLL B6 target detail and BAL location are only partially structured.
evaluations.cpt: 31624, 31627, 31628, and +31654 are supported. Linear EBUS should derive 31652, not 31653.
evaluations.schema: Classic nodal-station hallucination causing downstream CPT inflation.

hallucinations: Therapeutic aspiration/31645 is not clearly required by the note; secretion clearance may be incidental toileting during a navigational case.
mismatches: Complication severity is overstated as moderate bleeding when the note describes mild post-cryobiopsy hemorrhage controlled endoscopically.
missed_details: Sedation/general anesthesia details are not surfaced in the registry section.
evaluations.cpt: 31623, 31624, 31627, 31628, and +31654 are supported. 31645 is gray-zone and overcalled here.
evaluations.schema: Peripheral sampling is largely correct, but aspiration and bleeding severity are too aggressive.

hallucinations: established_tracheostomy_route=true and CPT 31615 are unsupported; this note is percutaneous tracheostomy placement, not bronchoscopy through an established trach.
mismatches: The note documents percutaneous tracheostomy, but deterministic coding suppresses 31600 and substitutes bronchoscopic codes.
missed_details: Modified Griggs/GWDF technique, ultrasound co-guidance, and extended-length Portex/Shiley selection are not surfaced cleanly.
evaluations.cpt: 31600 is the supported primary procedure. 31615/31622 are not defensible from the note as selected.
evaluations.schema: Procedure presence is partly right, but coding logic is inverted by false established-trach reasoning.

hallucinations: The registry treats this as BLVR, but the note is valve placement for postoperative bronchopleural fistula/persistent air leak, not lung-volume reduction.
number_of_valves=9 is unsupported; the note documents 3 valves.
mismatches: Sedation is set to General though the note explicitly clarifies Moderate sedation.
missed_details: Individual segmental valve placements (RUL B1, B3, B2) are not represented.
evaluations.cpt: 31647 is compatible with documented valve placement, but the extraction misclassifies the indication/procedure family and inflates valve count.
evaluations.schema: Core device placement is recognized, but the wrong therapeutic family is applied.

mismatches: Bleeding is promoted to a moderate complication although the note describes mild diffuse mucosal hemorrhage controlled with cold saline.
missed_details: RUL B2 target granularity and biopsy count (x4) are not deeply structured.
evaluations.cpt: 31624 and 31628 are supported.
evaluations.schema: Good bronchoscopy/BAL/TBBX capture with only complication-severity inflation.

hallucinations: Station 7 is labeled malignant by ROSE in the JSON, but the note says station 7 ROSE showed atypical cells.
Station 10R is mislabeled as forceps_biopsy; the note documents TBNA x2.
missed_details: Minor hemorrhage is coded more aggressively than documented.
evaluations.cpt: 31623, 31625, and 31653 are supported by the raw note.
evaluations.schema: Procedure families are correct, but nodal event action/outcome logic is wrong.

mismatches: The note's main therapeutic work is mucus plug extraction and lavage, but therapeutic aspiration is not represented.

missed_details: BAL site and mucus-cast extraction passes are not structured.

hallucinations: inspection_findings lose negation and read as if there were an endobronchial abnormality, though the note says none.

mismatches: Separate diagnostic bronchoscopy coding is likely overcalled in a PDT note where bronchoscopy is guidance rather than a standalone diagnostic service.

mismatches: Montgomery T-tube insertion is documented, but no airway-stent/T-tube placement object is present.

hallucinations: 31645 is not clearly supported; secretion suctioning is incidental in a major tumor-debulking case.

hallucinations: airway_stent.performed=true and CPT 31638 are unsupported; the note explicitly says covered stent was evaluated and deferred.
